rows.finalText: "What is the next right step in my calling" is best read here through Purpose / Calling with a right path emphasis. Clouds (6) in Past sets the tone with ambiguity asks for careful pacing and better questions. Clouds colors your calling through uncertainty around the path, and the need to separate real ambiguity from self-protective confusion before committing further. Present centers on Clover (2), where brief luck offers a manageable opening becomes the point that can redirect the whole sequence. Clover colors your calling through small improvements compound if acted on quickly. Coffin (8) in Future suggests release an outdated pattern gracefully, once the middle-card pressure has been worked with directly. The path becomes clearest where Clouds (6) meets Clover (2): a blend of uncertainty and luck, asking you to name unknowns before choosing direction while staying alert to assuming fortune will remain without effort.
